summary: Tested five staff order ownership bug fixes. Backend: 13/13 tests PASSED - staff order creation, visibility, ownership, update/copy/status operations all working correctly. Frontend: Admin Pricing Page loads without re-login, Reseller Orders Page shows all 4 tabs (WIP, Placed, Shipped, Staff Order). Note: Frontend was making requests to 'suits-india-admin' URL due to cached build, but API logic is correct.

minor.issue: Does not include parent_reseller_email for staff users (login endpoint correctly includes it)

integration_issues.issue: Frontend build cached with wrong REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL (suits-india-admin instead of suits-india-dev). Need to rebuild frontend to use correct URL.

issues: PostHog and Cloudflare Insights scripts blocked - not critical, affects analytics only

action_items: OPTIONAL: Add parent_reseller_email to /api/auth/me endpoint response for staff users
NOTE: Frontend needs rebuild if URL changed - run 'cd /app/frontend && yarn build' after .env changes
critical_code_review_comments: orders.py line 51: get_reseller_email() helper correctly handles staff users by returning parent_reseller_email
orders.py line 89-90: create_order correctly sets reseller_email to parent for staff users
orders.py line 176-181: list_orders status='staff' correctly filters orders where created_by != reseller_email
orders.py line 259: update_order correctly uses get_reseller_email() for ownership check
orders.py line 288: update_order_status correctly uses get_reseller_email() for ownership check
orders.py line 346: copy_order correctly uses get_reseller_email() and sets reseller_email to parent for staff
WIPOrdersPage.jsx line 46: OrderDetailsModal handles array configuration sets correctly
WIPOrdersPage.jsx line 336-359: Pricing toggle (Customer/Admin) buttons with data-testids implemented
PricingModulePage.jsx: Removed unused useAuth import - page loads correctly

success_rate.frontend: Partial - UI structure verified, data fetch issue due to cached build URL mismatch

seed_data_creation: Created staff.reseller@test.com user with parent_reseller_email='reseller@test.com' for testing. Created test order 'TestConfig -- 800339' with array configuration data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Staff order ownership fixes verified: 1) get_reseller_email() helper at orders.py:51 returns parent_reseller_email for staff. 2) Order creation (line 89-90) sets reseller_email to parent for staff. 3) list_orders status='staff' (line 176-181) filters orders where created_by != reseller_email. 4) update/copy/status operations use get_reseller_email() for ownership validation. 5) Frontend OrderDetailsModal handles array config sets and has pricing toggle. Staff test user: staff.reseller@test.com/staff123 with parent=reseller@test.com.

features_tested.staff_order_creation_sets_parent_email: PASS - reseller_email set to parent, created_by set to staff email
features_tested.staff_can_see_parent_reseller_wip_orders: PASS - Staff sees orders where reseller_email matches parent
features_tested.reseller_can_see_staff_created_orders: PASS - Staff-created orders appear in reseller's WIP tab
features_tested.staff_tab_shows_staff_created_orders: PASS - status='staff' returns orders where created_by != reseller_email
features_tested.staff_can_view_parent_order: PASS - GET /api/orders/{id} works for staff on parent's orders
features_tested.staff_can_copy_parent_order: PASS - POST /api/orders/{id}/copy works, sets correct reseller_email
features_tested.staff_cannot_access_other_reseller_order: PASS - 403 returned for orders not belonging to parent
features_tested.admin_pricing_page_loads: PASS - Page loads at /admin/pricing without re-login
features_tested.reseller_orders_page_tabs: PASS - All 4 tabs visible (WIP, Placed Order, Shipped, Staff Order)
features_tested.order_details_modal_config_array: UI elements verified - modal structure includes config section
features_tested.order_details_modal_pricing_toggle: UI elements verified - pricing toggle data-testids present
